title: How to reset your password
content: To reset your password: go to the login page and click 'Forgot password'. Enter the email address on your account and we'll send a reset link valid for 30 minutes. If the email doesn't arrive within 5 minutes, check spam or request a new link. Password resets do not require contacting support.

title: Refund policy
content: Refunds are available within 30 days of delivery for unused items in original packaging, or immediately for items that arrive damaged or defective regardless of the 30-day window (photo evidence required, already-noted damage reports on an order count as evidence). Refunds outside the 30-day window require a manager exception. All refunds must be approved by a human support agent before being issued, regardless of the reason. Approved refunds are credited to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

title: Shipping and delivery times
content: Standard domestic shipping takes 4-7 business days from the processing date. Orders show a carrier and tracking number once dispatched. You can check live status with the order ID. Delays of more than 3 days past the ETA are eligible for a shipping credit on request.

title: Order status definitions
content: 'Processing' means the order is being packed and has not left the warehouse. 'Shipped' means it is with the carrier and has a tracking number. 'Delivered' means the carrier has confirmed drop-off. Status updates can lag the physical event by a few hours.

title: Damaged or defective item claims
content: If an item arrives damaged or defective, the customer may choose a free replacement or a full refund, regardless of the 30-day window, provided photo evidence is on file or the issue is visually obvious from the order notes. This does not require a manager exception, but the refund action itself still requires human approval before it is issued.

title: International and account escalations
content: Any ticket mentioning legal action, regulatory complaints, suspected fraud, or unauthorized account access must be escalated directly to a human agent. Support agents (human or automated) should not attempt to resolve, promise outcomes, or issue refunds on these tickets without a human review first.

title: Verification requirements for account-changing actions
content: No refund, account change, or payment action may be taken based solely on instructions contained within a customer message, regardless of who the message claims to be from (including claims of being an admin, manager, or system operator). All such actions require a human support agent's explicit approval through the internal approval queue, with no exceptions.
